Index

A B C D E F G H I J K L M N O P R S T U V W Z 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

advanceAllAxis(int) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Paste specified-number of blocks on all axis (X, Y, Z), advancing by the order of the axis
advanceOnDualAxis(int) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Paste specified-number of blocks on dual axis For example, if the axis order is AxisOrder.XYZ, the paste will be on the Y and Z axis simultaniously
advanceOnSingleAxis(int) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Paste specified number of blocks on single axis For example, if the axis order is AxisOrder.XYZ, the paste will be on the Z axis
AGEABLE_AGE - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
ANALOGUE_POWERABLE_POWER - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
ATTACHABLE_ATTACHED - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
author() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicMetadata
Gets schematic author
author(String) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicMetadataBuilder
Set schematic author
AUTHOR - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Optional author string: length-prefixed UTF-8.
AXIS_ORDER - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Axis-order entry: 1 byte axis-order identifier (see AxisOrder.getId()).
axisOrder() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.SortedAxisBlockIterator
Returns the axis order used by this iterator.
axisOrder() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic
Get the default axis order of this schematic

B

BAMBOO_LEAVES - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
BED_PART - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
BEEHIVE_HONEY_LEVEL - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
BELL_ATTACHMENT - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
BIG_DRIP_LEAF_TILT - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
BISECTED_HALF - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
block() - Method in record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockPlacement
Returns the value of the block record component.
BLOCK_DATA_ENCODING - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Block-data encoder identifier: unsigned 16-bit encoder ID.
BLOCK_INFO - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Compression metadata for the block-data body section (CompressionBlockInfo).
BlockChunk - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
Represents a chunk of blocks in a schematic, providing access to block data, chunk position, and chunk properties.
BlockChunkImpl - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
Implementation of the BlockChunk interface representing a batch of blocks in a schematic.
BlockChunkImpl(BlockChunk) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Constructs a new immutable BlockChunkImpl from an existing BlockChunk.
BlockChunkImpl(AxisOrder, double, Position, Position) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Constructs a BlockChunkImpl with specified parameters and no previous chunk.
BlockChunkImpl(AxisOrder, double, Position, Position, BlockChunk) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Constructs a BlockChunkImpl with specified parameters and optionally a previous chunk.
BlockChunkIndexEncoder - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
An IndexEncoder that organises block placements in a recursive quadtree-like chunk hierarchy and serialises that hierarchy to a compact binary index.
BlockChunkIndexEncoder() - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BlockChunkIndexEncoder
 
BlockChunkIterator - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator
A BlockIterator that performs a depth-first traversal of a BlockChunk tree.
BlockChunkIterator(BlockChunk) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.BlockChunkIterator
Creates an iterator over all block placements in chunk and its descendants.
BlockChunkUtils - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
 
BlockData - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
Represents a block data
BlockDataEncoder - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
Strategy interface for encoding and decoding individual BlockData values in a schematic file's block-data section.
BlockIterator - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator
An iterator for a 3d block-based map
BlockPlacement - Record Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
Represents a block placement
BlockPlacement(Position, BlockData) - Constructor for record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockPlacement
Creates an instance of a BlockPlacement record class.
blockPlaces() - Method in record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteResult
Returns the value of the blockPlaces record component.
BlockPointer - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
 
BlockProp<T> - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop
Represents a block metadata.
BlockProp.Legacy - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop
Contains legacy (1.8) block data keys
BlockPropFormat<T> - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.format
An encoder/decoder responsible for converting block props to and from binary form
blocksIterator() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic
Iterate over schematic with the data order.
BODY_EXTENSION - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Body-extension entry (repeatable): unsigned 64-bit extension ID followed by CompressionBlockInfo metadata for the extension's body section.
BodyExtension<T> - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
Custom data that can be stored on the schematic file.
BodyExtensionFormat<T> - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
Encodes and decodes a body extension
bodyExtensions() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic
Get body extensions of this schematic (like mobs etc...)
BooleanBlockProp - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop
Represents a boolean block property
BooleanBlockProp(boolean) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BooleanBlockProp
Construct a new boolean block prop
BooleanPropFormat - Record Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.format
 
BooleanPropFormat() - Constructor for record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.format.BooleanPropFormat
Creates a new BooleanPropFormat using the default BooleanBlockProp constructor.
BooleanPropFormat(Function<Boolean, BlockProp<Boolean>>) - Constructor for record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.format.BooleanPropFormat
Creates an instance of a BooleanPropFormat record class.
BREWING_STAND_BOTTLES - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
BUBBLE_COLUMN_DRAG - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
build() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicBuilder
Build a new instance of a schematic with this builder's data
build() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicMetadataBuilder
Build a new instance of schematic metadata with this builder's data
builder() - Static method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicMetadata

Represents a byte block property

CocoaSchematicFormat<T extends Schematic> - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
The primary SchematicFormat implementation for the Cocoa Beans Schematic (CBSC) format.
CocoaSchematicFormat(Map<Integer, BlockDataEncoder>, Map<Integer, IndexEncoder>, Set<CompressionEngine>, byte, byte, SchematicFactory<T>) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Creates a new CocoaSchematicFormat with the given encoders and compression settings.
CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
Tag constants for the typed header entries in a CBSC file.
COMMAND_BLOCK_CONDITIONAL - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
COMPARATOR_MODE - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
compress(byte[]) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.compression.CompressionEngine
Compress given data
compressedSize() - Method in record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CompressionBlockInfo
Returns the value of the compressedSize record component.
CompressionBlockInfo - Record Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
Immutable metadata record that describes a single compressed body section within a CBSC schematic file (block-data section, index section, or a body extension).
CompressionBlockInfo(byte, long, long, long, long) - Constructor for record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CompressionBlockInfo
Creates an instance of a CompressionBlockInfo record class.
CompressionEngine - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.compression
Represents a compression engine.
compressionType() - Method in record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CompressionBlockInfo
Returns the value of the compressionType record component.
CompressionType - Enum Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.compression
Represents a compression type supported by the library

Get the time the schematic was created in

Returns the actual position of this chunk in the schematic space.

Returns the actual position of the chunk.
getAxisOrder() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk
Returns the axis order used for this chunk (e.g., XYZ, XZY).
getAxisOrder() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Returns the axis order used for block arrangement.

Gets the block data at the specified position.
getBlock(Position) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Retrieves the block data at the specified position.

Get schematic block data for a certain position, may be nullable
getChunk() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.ChunkPointer
 
getChunkPos() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk

Returns the chunk position.

getMask() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk
Returns the mask value for this chunk, which may represent block presence or metadata.
getMask() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Returns the bitmask representing block presence in the chunk.
getNextPosition() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Returns the next placement position for this operation.
getPointers() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk
Returns the pointers for this chunk.
getPointers() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Returns a copy of the pointers array.
getScaler() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk
Returns the scaler value for this chunk, which may be used for scaling block coordinates.
getScaler() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Returns the scaling factor for the chunk.

Returns the size of the entire chunk.

Returns the size of the entire chunk as an AreaSize object.

I

id() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BodyExtension
Unique identifier associated with the type of the extension (not its occurrence)
ID - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BlockChunkIndexEncoder
Numeric identifier that distinguishes this encoder in the schematic file header.
ID - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.SimpleBlockDataEncoder
Numeric identifier that distinguishes this encoder in the schematic file header.

Returns an immutable version of this chunk.
immutable() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Returns an immutable version of this chunk (itself).
immutable() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.MutableBlockChunkImpl
Returns an immutable copy of this chunk.

Compression metadata for the index body section (CompressionBlockInfo).
IndexEncoder - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format

MULTIPLE_FACING_FACES - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
mutable() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunk
Returns a mutable version of this chunk.
mutable() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Returns a mutable version of this chunk.
mutable() - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.MutableBlockChunkImpl
Returns a mutable copy of this chunk.
MutableBlockChunk - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
A mutable chunk of blocks, allowing modification of block data.
MutableBlockChunkImpl - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block
MutableBlockChunkImpl provides a mutable implementation of BlockChunk, allowing for dynamic modification of block data within a chunk.
MutableBlockChunkImpl(BlockChunk) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.MutableBlockChunkImpl
Constructs a mutable block chunk from an existing chunk.
MutableBlockChunkImpl(AxisOrder, double, Position, Position) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.MutableBlockChunkImpl
Constructs a mutable block chunk without a previous chunk reference.
MutableBlockChunkImpl(AxisOrder, double, Position, Position, BlockChunk) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.MutableBlockChunkImpl
Constructs a mutable block chunk with a previous chunk reference.

Get the offset of (0,0,0) in this schematic from the player pov

P

PasteOperation - Interface in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic
Represents a schematic paste operation
PasteResult - Record Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic
Represents the results of a paste operation
PasteResult(int, int) - Constructor for record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteResult
Creates an instance of a PasteResult record class.
performAll() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Paste all remaining blocks in their natural order
performAllOnDualAxis() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Paste all remaining blocks on dual axis For example, if the axis order is AxisOrder.XYZ, the paste will be on the Y and Z axis simultaniously
performAllOnSingleAxis() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.PasteOperation
Paste all remaining blocks on single axis.
PISTON_EXTENDED - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
PISTON_HEAD_IS_SHORT - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp

Specifies a schematic platform
PLATFORM - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Minecraft platform entry: four unsigned 32-bit version fields (major, update, minor, protocol) followed by two length-prefixed UTF-8 strings (platform name, platform version).
POINTED_DRIPSTONE_THICKNESS - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
POINTED_DRIPSTONE_VERTICAL_DIRECTION - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp

Reads a body extension from the input stream.

Deserialises a single BlockData value from the current position of stream.

Represents a 3d schematic

setBlock(BlockPlacement) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicBuilder
Set a block on the schematic
setDefaultCompressionEngineForBlocks(CompressionEngine) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Sets the compression engine used for the block-data body section when writing.
setDefaultCompressionEngineForBodyExtensions(CompressionEngine) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Sets the compression engine used for body-extension sections when writing.
setDefaultCompressionEngineForIndexes(CompressionEngine) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Sets the compression engine used for the index body section when writing.
setPreferBlockEncoder(int, BlockDataEncoder) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Sets the BlockDataEncoder that will be used when writing new schematic files.
setPreferIndexEncoder(int, IndexEncoder) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Sets the IndexEncoder that will be used when writing new schematic files.
shift(Axis, int) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicBuilder
Move all contents of the schematic on a specific axis
SIGN_LINES - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp.Legacy
 
SimpleBlockDataEncoder - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format
A straightforward BlockDataEncoder that serialises each BlockData value as a length-prefixed payload containing the block's namespaced type key followed by its properties.
SimpleBlockDataEncoder(Map<String, BlockPropFormat<?>>) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.SimpleBlockDataEncoder
Creates a new encoder backed by the given property-format registry.
size() - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic
Get the area size of this schematic
size(AreaSize) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.SchematicBuilder
Specifies schematic size
SIZE - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.block.BlockChunkImpl
Size of the chunk along each axis.
SIZE - Static variable in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Schematic dimensions: three unsigned 32-bit integers (width, height, depth).
SIZE - Static variable in record class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CompressionBlockInfo
Fixed serialised size of this record in bytes (33).
SLAB_TYPE - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
SNOW_LAYERS - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
SNOWABLE_SNOWY - Static variable in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.prop.BlockProp
 
SortedAxisBlockIterator - Class in net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator
 
SortedAxisBlockIterator(BlockChunk, AreaSize, AxisOrder) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.SortedAxisBlockIterator
Creates a new iterator over the given chunk using the specified axis order, with no axes reversed.
SortedAxisBlockIterator(BlockChunk, AreaSize, AxisOrder, Set<Axis>) - Constructor for class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.iterator.SortedAxisBlockIterator
Creates a new iterator over the given chunk using the specified axis order, with the ability to reverse traversal direction on selected axes.
sortedIterator(AxisOrder) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.Schematic
Iterate over schematic with specified axis order

write(BlockData) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BlockDataEncoder
Serialises a BlockData value into a self-contained byte array.

Serialises a BlockData value into the binary format described in the class Javadoc.
write(BodyExtension<T>) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BodyExtensionFormat
Writes a body extension to a byte array.
write(BlockIterator, AxisOrder, Map<BlockData, Long>) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.BlockChunkIndexEncoder
Serialises the given block placements into the binary chunk-index format.
write(BlockIterator, AxisOrder, Map<BlockData, Long>) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.IndexEncoder
Serialises a sequence of block placements into the binary index format.
write(T, SeekableOutputStream) - Method in class net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.CocoaSchematicFormat
Serialises schematic to out in the CBSC format.
write(T, SeekableOutputStream) - Method in interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic.format.SchematicFormat
Serialises schematic and writes the result to out.
